verdicts.criterion: User can submit the form with valid input and see a success message.
evidence: User can submit the form with valid input and see a success message.

verdicts.criterion: Form validation rejects empty required fields with an inline error message.
evidence: Filled name='Alice', email='alice@example.com'. Clicked Submit. ... No console errors
Form validation rejects empty required fields with an inline error message.
verdicts.notes: Adjacent regression behavior (validation error rendering) cannot be assessed without the empty-field path being exercised.

verdicts.criterion: Logout button signs the user out and redirects to /login.
evidence: (not tested — verify session interrupted before reaching logout test)
Logout button signs the user out and redirects to /login.
verdicts.notes: Logout flow not exercised; no adjacent observations to assess regression.
